ABOUT ME

I am a Forensic Science postgraduate currently based in Kerala, India, with 1.5 years of professional experience as a Scientific Officer at Probelab Forensic Laboratory, Hyderabad. My work sits at the intersection of traditional forensic science and modern cybersecurity.

My forensic background gives me something most SOC analysts don't have — a disciplined, evidence-first mindset. I don't just detect threats, I reconstruct what happened, document it precisely, and make sure it doesn't happen again.

I am actively seeking SOC Analyst L1, DFIR, and Cybersecurity roles in the UAE and India. Immediately available for relocation.

04

PROJECTS

// THREAT DETECTION
Security Event Log Analysis & Brute Force Detection
Analyzed Windows Event ID 4625 to detect failed login patterns and identify brute force attack behavior. Correlated logs across multiple sources to reconstruct the full attack timeline, identify affected accounts, and map findings to MITRE ATT&CK T1110.
Windows Event Logs MITRE ATT&CK Brute Force Log Correlation
// PHISHING ANALYSIS
Phishing Email Header Analysis & Social Engineering Detection
Investigated phishing email headers to detect spoofed sender domains and malicious URLs. Identified 3 key social engineering indicators and produced a structured forensic report with attack method documentation, evidence chain, and preventive recommendations.
